subject: Sports
title: Kobe Bryant: Mamba Mentality
description: Learn Kobe Bryant: Mamba Mentality in one minute.

hook.text: He scored 81 points in a single game—the second-highest total in NBA history. That was just one night.

buildup.text: Kobe entered the NBA straight from high school in 1996 and spent his entire career with the Lakers.

discovery.text: He won five championships, modeled his game after Jordan, and practiced with obsessive intensity.

twist.text: His 'Mamba Mentality' philosophy—relentless focus and zero excuses—became a cultural phenomenon beyond sport.

climax.text: In his final game, Kobe scored 60 points. He went out exactly the way he played—refusing to quit.

punchline.text: Sixty points in his last game. Mamba out.

quiz.question: How many points did Kobe score in his famous 2006 game?
